task: Assemble child evidence and signoff matrix
acceptance_criteria: Every child has explicit evidence and no unresolved gate is hidden
notes: Do not start root signoff while any product debt child is still open

acceptance_criteria: Backend, contract, and web gates all pass in one signoff window
validation_command: pnpm openapi:check && uv run pytest tests/api/auth tests/api/rbac tests/api/alerting/test_alerting_contract.py tests/api/analytics tests/integration/control_plane/test_control_plane.py tests/integration/control_plane/test_control_plane_postgres.py tests/schema/test_schema_bootstrap.py && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck
notes: Offline green is the minimum bar; any missing live gate must be called out explicitly

task: Write final closeout evidence and update PRD debt truth
acceptance_criteria: Epic artifacts and closeout docs reflect the new completed state
notes: The epic is not done until disk truth and signoff evidence agree
